projects.raw_text:
Design of High Speed Standard Cell Library

May 2021 – Dec 2021


Associated with Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology, Delhi

Design and characterization of High speed flip-flops for high speed standard cell library at 65nm technology.

Implementation of Polar Encoder algorithm on Zedboard using SDSoC

Feb 2021 – May 2021


Associated with Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology, Delhi

Design of Polar Encoder on Xilinx SDSoC . Verifying the functionality for various data sizes. Performance analysis for various Hardware and software partitions

Other contributors

View all contributors
Process compensated Wordline Underdrive circuit

Feb 2021 – May 2021


Associated with Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology, Delhi

Design and layout of Process Compensated wordline underdrive driver. The aim of this project was to underdrive the word line only at the PVT corner which is critical for SNM i.e. FS125. This scheme does
not underdrive the worldline in the PVTs which are critical for write margin and cell current. The layout was verified for DRC and LVS. Comparison of pre and post-layout simulation results was done.
The design was made using Cadence Virtuoso and simulations were performed using Mentor Graphics- Eldo

Other contributors

View all contributors
RTL to GDS Flow

Jan 2020 – May 2021


Associated with Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology, Delhi

Design of  High PSRR Folded Cascode Operational Amplifier for LDO Applications

Sep 2020 – Dec 2020


Associated with Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology, Delhi

High PSRR Op-amp designed for LDO application using Folded Cascode Topology with PMOS input differential pair. The design was made using Cadence Virtuoso. The simulation was done by Spectre Circuit Simulator

Other contributors

View all contributors
Design of OAI 222 Complex Gate

Sep 2020 – Dec 2020


Associated with Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology, Delhi

Design and layout of complex gate using domino logic. The layout was verified for DRC and LVS. Comparison of pre and post layout simulation results was done.
The design was made using Cadence Virtuoso and simulations were performed on Mentor Graphics- Eldo

Other contributors



View all contributors
Multi-controlled Smart Wheelchair

Aug 2018 – Apr 2019


Associated with Kamla Nehru Institute of Technology, Sultanpur

Low Altitude Weather satellite

Mar 2017 – Apr 2017


Associated with Kamla Nehru Institute of Technology, Sultanpur

Low altitude Weather satellite is a local weather station which gives live weather details and forecast the upcoming weather.
